name: Crowne Plaza Ft. Myers
summary: FF&E procurement and installation support for Crowne Plaza Ft. Myers, with guest room, lobby, and meeting environments delivered to brand standards.
quote: We're great problem solvers, but we're also problem avoiders
overview: Pinnacle South supported FF&E coordination for Crowne Plaza in Fort Myers, Florida. Scope included model guest room staging, lobby and social spaces, and meeting-ready environments such as boardroom areas. Our team coordinated product selection, procurement timing, and installation support to align with project milestones.
spotlight: This property required balanced delivery across guest-facing social zones and business-focused spaces. We managed sequencing and quality control to help create a cohesive guest experience from arrival through meetings and in-room stays.
